query:
SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, 
       (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM calls c WHERE c.userId = u.id AND c.status = 'completed') as graded_calls,
       (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_badges ub WHERE ub.userId = u.id) as badge_count
FROM users u 
WHERE u.name LIKE '%Kyle%' OR u.email LIKE '%kyle%'
LIMIT 5;
